name: python3-ipython
title: python3-ipython
description:
Enhanced interactive Python shell (Python 3 version)
IPython can be used as a replacement for the standard Python shell,
or it can be used as a complete working environment for scientific
computing (like Matlab or Mathematica) when paired with the standard
Python scientific and numerical tools. It supports dynamic object
introspections, numbered input/output prompts, a macro system,
session logging, session restoring, complete system shell access,
verbose and colored traceback reports, auto-parentheses, auto-quoting,
and is embeddable in other Python programs.
.
This package contains the backend terminal shell for Python 3: for
the actual frontend install ipython3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ipython because Enhanced interactive Python shell (Python 3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ipython as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ipython with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ipython --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
